title: OLAP Dashboard & Scorecard Creation Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of transforming raw data into actionable dashboards and scorecards using OLAP technology within a data warehouse.
relationships: Data is extracted from Data Warehouse and transformed
Transformed data populates the multidimensional OLAP Cube
OLAP Server processes queries (slicing, dicing, drilling)
Application requests data from OLAP Server for visualization
User interacts with the Dashboard/Scorecard for insights
